name: xyz.sputnikx/market
title: SputnikX Commerce & EU Trade Analytics
description: EU trade & customs analytics, product catalog, CRM agents, provably fair RNG. x402.

environmentVariables.name: SPUTNIKX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: SputnikX API key for authentication (obtain from admin panel at sputnikx.xyz/admin)

environmentVariables.name: SPUTNIKX_TENANT
environmentVariables.description: Tenant slug: siltums (heating) or woodpoint (wood B2B)

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search in-stock products in the catalog with filters

tools.name: get_prices
tools.description: Get current product prices in EUR with price_per_kg

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check product stock across warehouse locations

tools.name: calculator
tools.description: Calculate heating fuel needs from boiler specifications

tools.name: create_quote
tools.description: Create a draft quote with line items and 21% VAT

tools.name: place_order
tools.description: Place a product order with idempotency (max EUR 50,000)

tools.name: query_trade
tools.description: Query EU trade data (28M+ Eurostat COMEXT records) — 9 types: overview, countries, timeline, top partners/products, balance, wood products, heatmap, product detail

tools.name: query_customs
tools.description: Query Latvia customs analytics (3.8GB) — 6 types: classifications, trends, top commodities, country analysis, tariff lookup, seasonal patterns

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List available CRM agent skills with pricing and example tasks

tools.name: run_skill
tools.description: Execute CRM agent skill (oracle, spider, tracker, diplomat, sniper, strategist, finansist, gramatvedis)

tools.name: rng_roll
tools.description: Generate provably fair random number (dice, coin, range, float, shuffle, pick)

tools.name: rng_verify
tools.description: Verify a previous roll's fairness using HMAC-SHA256
